Below is a quick **overview** of each of the five active internships in Pune that align with your Python & SQL background. The bullet points summarize the typical duties and requirements mentioned in the original postings (or implied by the role title). All listings are still open for applications.

---

### 1️⃣ Software Engineering Intern, Summer 2026 – **Google**
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India  
- **What you’ll do:** Work on a product‑oriented engineering team building scalable services; write production‑grade Python code; collaborate on data‑intensive features that often involve SQL/BigQuery queries.  
- **Typical requirements:** Strong Python programming, familiarity with SQL databases, problem‑solving ability, and a passion for building large‑scale systems.  
- **Apply:** <https://peerlist.io/company/google/careers/software-engineering-intern-summer-2026/jobha9nldjrde8eeb2aaqqb9qdpno7?utm_campaign=google_jobs_apply&utm_source=google_jobs_apply&utm_medium=organic>

---

### 2️⃣ Software Engineering Intern (C++, C#, **Python**) – **Rockwell Automation**
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India  
- **What you’ll do:** Contribute to automation‑software projects; develop/maintain codebases in Python (and optionally C++/C#); work with relational databases and write SQL queries for data handling or reporting.  
- **Typical requirements:** Proficiency in Python (plus any of C++/C#), solid understanding of SQL, ability to work in cross‑functional teams, and interest in industrial automation.  
- **Apply:** <https://cse.noticebard.com/software-engineering/software-engineering-intern-at-rockwell-automation/?utm_campaign=google_jobs_apply&utm_source=google_jobs_apply&utm_medium=organic>

---

### 3️⃣ Software Development – Internship – **Mediosim Technology Private Limited**
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India  
- **What you’ll do:** Assist the development team in building simulation/visualization tools; write Python scripts for data processing; interact with databases using SQL for storing simulation results.  
- **Typical requirements:** Good command of Python, basic SQL knowledge, eagerness to learn software development best practices, and ability to work on research‑oriented projects.  
- **Apply:** <https://internshala.com/internship/detail/software-development-internship-in-pune-at-mediosim-technology-private-limited1775034053?utm_campaign=google_jobs_apply&utm_source=google_jobs_apply&utm_medium=organic>

---

### 4️⃣ Software Engineering Intern – **Roche**
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India  
- **What you’ll do:** Join a biomedical‑software team; develop data pipelines and analytical tools using Python; query clinical or research databases with SQL to support drug‑development insights.  
- **Typical requirements:** Strong Python coding skills, experience with SQL (or willingness to learn), interest in healthcare/biotech, and ability to work in a regulated environment.  
- **Apply:** <https://peerlist.io/company/roche122/careers/software-engineering-intern/jobhbabnlrkd67lgmhb7bjmoojg6jd?utm_campaign=google_jobs_apply&utm_source=google_jobs_apply&utm_medium=organic>

---

### 5️⃣ Software Engineer Intern – **Knorr‑Bremse India**
- **Location:** Pune, Maharashtra, India  
- **What you’ll do:** Support the development of safety‑critical automotive software;
